div1.entryFree:
Partaker, 1) one who takes the party of another, confederate: for your p. Pole and you yourself, I'll note you in my book of memory, H6A II, 4, 100.
2) participator, sharer: p. in thy happiness, Gent. I, 1, 14. --s of a little gain, H6A II, 1, 52. to let me be p. Ant. I, 4, 83 (== to let me hear of it).
